RFC §3.8.5.3: first Saturday following first Sunday, 10 occurrences
RFC §3.8.5.3: second-to-last Monday of month, 6 occurrences

BYSETPOS=-1 with BYMONTHDAY selects last listed day
BYYEARDAY with negative values (-1 = last day of year)
DST: America/Los_Angeles fall-back 2024, hourly crossing fold
DST: Europe/Berlin fall-back 2024, hourly crossing fold
DST: Pacific/Apia spring 2024, daily crossing fold
YEARLY BYWEEKNO+BYMONTH with WKST=TU: week anchor is Tuesday not Monday
YEARLY BYWEEKNO+BYDAY+WKST=SA: week 49 starts Saturday not Monday
YEARLY BYYEARDAY restricted by BYMONTH: day 140 (May) excluded when BYMONTH={1,12}
YEARLY BYYEARDAY+BYMONTHDAY intersection: only Oct 7 satisfies both yearday and monthday
YEARLY BYYEARDAY+BYMONTHDAY+BYMONTH: leap year day -362 (Jan 5) excluded when 5 not in BYMONTHDAY
YEARLY BYYEARDAY+ordinal BYDAY+BYMONTH: Jul 17 is 3rd Thu only when Jul 1 is Tue
YEARLY BYWEEKNO+BYDAY+BYMONTHDAY+BYMONTH+WKST=TU: all filters intersect to sparse occurrences
